health.summary: Core services healthy (ict-trader-live + ict-web-api both active, restarted 05:55Z; heartbeat 6s, git_sha 7a2983f1 == origin/main HEAD). 44 strategies loaded, all timers active. Two flags: (1) IB MES clients in transient breaker_open (liveness_probe_timeout, likely_wedged=false, last_ok ~5min prior, auto-clears ~1-2min) - the benign cold-flow probe backoff, not a wedge; (2) a real-money bybit_2 BTCUSDT order refused pre-flight for sub-lot-minimum qty (0.00037 < 0.001) - Prime-Directive-correct refusal but recurring ERROR-level alert noise (new BL-20260716-BYBIT2-SUBMIN-QTY).

performance.summary: Real money (bybit_2, 7d): 11 trades, 27.3% win, +$5.57 net, expectancy $0.51, PF 1.34 - a small NET-POSITIVE week carried by the ETH book (eth_pullback_2h +$10.34, trend_donchian_eth_4h +$9.65) against the persistent alt bleeders (ada_pullback_2h -$10.05, xrp_pullback_2h -$4.14, htf_pullback_trend_2h -$1.30). 30d real is ~flat (+$0.50, expectancyR -0.34). Grading complete: 12-row ungraded delta appended (B:2 C:7 D:3); 3 D-grades are very-low-confidence unfilled shadow setups (conf 0.06/0.16/0.28). Paper 7d -$7.5k in $ but +0.50 totalR (~flat risk-normalized; inflated paper notionals). ict_scalp_5m real-money 30d R-collapse CONFIRMED (expectancyR -1.26).
flags: ict_scalp_5m real-money 30d expectancyR -1.26 (high hit-rate, negative R) - TUNE/DEMOTE candidate

ml.summary: Training IS progressing: a full cycle ran 2026-07-15 (76 manifests, head e82ac858), datasets built OK (market_raw 215,862 rows, build_end rc:0). Shadow soaks accruing well - btc/eth/sol 5m regime heads ~2300-2487 predictions over 9 days with healthy score spreads. BUT three flags: (1) btc-regime-5m-lgbm-flow-v1 manifest repeatedly OOM/terminated (exit 137 then 143 after ~19h) - the VPIN/order-flow head, DATA-BLOCKED + a memory hog (MB-20260613-002 / BL-20260715-TRAINER-CYCLE-MEM-SATURATION); (2) trainer resource pressure (mem 186MB free of 5.9GB, disk 87%); (3) NO promotions - all trained models sit at candidate, shadow->advisory structurally blocked on the live_agreement gate (MB-20260626-003). btc-regime-15m-tcn-* still empty_dataset-skip (recurring).
flags: regime-head promotion blocked on live_agreement gate - no shadow->advisory movement

consolidated.headline: Net-positive real-money week (+$5.57, PF 1.34) carried by the ETH book against small alt bleeders; core services healthy and grading is fully current. Watch items: a transient (benign) IB MES probe backoff, a recurring sub-min-qty BTCUSDT refusal on bybit_2, a trainer manifest (5m-flow head) repeatedly OOMing under real memory pressure, and no ML promotions - the regime heads have soaked their time but are blocked on the live_agreement gate.

cross_review_notes: ada_pullback_2h is the biggest loser on BOTH the real (-$10.05/2) and paper (-$1,694/2) books this week - a genuine strategy-edge concern, not an artifact.

The trainer memory pressure (health) and the 5m-flow manifest OOM (ml) are the same root cause: the box is at its swap ceiling and one heavy manifest tips it over - a footprint/serialization fix, not a resize (Ampere pool is full).

No real-money or paper account is DOWN this week; the IB MES 'breaker_open' at snapshot is the benign transient probe backoff (last_ok 5min prior, auto-recovers), distinct from the BL-20260708 warm-up wedge.
